en: Rosa Diaz. Tough, smart, hard to read and really scary.
ko: 로사 디아즈. 강하고, 똑똑하며, 읽기 힘들고, 정말 무서워.

en: Tell me who has me for Secret Santa. Oh, that takes all the fun out of it.
ko: 비밀 산타로 누가 나를 뽑았는지 말해줘.

en: It's Scully. He got you a scarf. I'll make him return it.
Charles Boyle. He's a grinder. Not the most brilliant detective, but he works harder than anyone else.
He's not physically gifted. Oh, man, my muffin.
Ah! Oh, my head. Muffin in my head. I stepped on my muffin in my head and my muffin...
Amy Santiago. She's got seven brothers, so she's always trying to prove she's tough.
ko: 에이미 산티아고. 그녀는 형이 일곱 명이라서 항상 강하다는 걸 증명하려고 해.

en: Careful, that stuff's pretty hot. Oh, is it?
ko: 조심해, 그거 꽤 뜨거워. 아, 그래?

en: She and Peralta have some big bet over who gets more rest this year.
ko: 그녀와 페랄타는 올해 누가 더 많이 쉴 수 있는지 큰 내기를 하고 있어.
